entries.final_output: Product features are specific characteristics, functions, or capabilities of a product that define what the product does and how it works. Each feature has a clear name, description, and a set of key functionality and key benefits for the user.

entries.task_description: Break each feature into user stories
entries.final_output:
As a new user, I want to be able to create an account so that I can access the full functionality of the product.
As a returning user, I want to be able to log in to my account quickly and securely to save time.
As a user, I want to be able to reset my password in case I forget it, to regain access to my account.
As a user, I want to be able to update my profile information to keep it current.
As a user, I want to be able to search for specific items within the product to find what I need efficiently.
As a user, I want to be able to filter search results based on different criteria to narrow down my options.
As a user, I want to be able to add items to my cart to save them for later purchase.
As a user, I want to be able to view my cart to see all the items I have selected for purchase.
As a user, I want to be able to remove items from my cart in case I change my mind about purchasing them.
As a user, I want to be able to proceed to checkout easily and securely to complete my purchase.

entries.task_description: Break each user story into development tasks
